name: XL Tuscan Ceramic Vase Blue - Threshold™
description:
Elevate the decor in any room with this Tuscan Ceramic Vase from Threshold™. Made of ceramic, this Tuscan vase is designed in blue with shiny finish for a luxe look. You can fill this watertight vase with fresh flowers, green stems or faux florals to add character and charm to any space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
